items._note: Extension (east full bathroom) <-> main wall at x=-12, door into the SE room.
EAST WING = second gallery corridor (mirrors the west) connecting the SE bedroom (and NE) to the landing.
East gallery corridor west wall (x=-0.5833), 4.5 ft corridor; doors to NE + SE bedrooms.
east-wing NE/SE bedroom divider at z=0, rooms west of the corridor (x -12..-0.5833).
WEST WING = East gallery corridor layout, two EQUAL bedrooms (10.5 ft) flanking a central bath (7.0 ft N-S).
Gallery corridor west wall (x=19.5833) with 3 doors; corridor widened to 4.5 ft (east wall at x=15.0833 unchanged). Bath door centered on the 7 ft bath.
Bath / Bedroom 1 divider (z=5.5833), rooms west of the corridor (x 19.5833..31). Bath is 7 ft N-S, centered at z=2.0833.
WEST BATHROOM fixtures (bath px[19.5833,31] x pz[-1.4167,5.5833]): toilet far-west, shower centered, vanity at the east end.
Shower centered E-W, backing the south wall, glass opening north.
Vanity at the east end, backing the north wall (clear of the corridor door), facing south.
BEDROOM 1 (NW) queen: headboard on the SOUTH wall (commanding position - sees the NE door across the room, off the door line; not under a window).
items.head: S

items._note: BEDROOM 2 (SW) queen: headboard on the NORTH wall (sees the E door, feet away from it; not under a window).
